layoutRegions.name: masthead
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarize directory group nesting risk and expose the cleanup staging action.

layoutRegions.name: nesting-graph
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect nested directory groups, transitive privilege, owners, parent groups, and cleanup state.

layoutRegions.name: membership-and-entitlement-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare stale owners, circular membership, app entitlements, and blast-radius previews.

layoutRegions.name: cleanup-plans
layoutRegions.purpose: Stage rollback-safe group cleanup plans with reversible emergency access paths.

components.name: GroupCard
components.purpose: Shows one nested directory group with parent, transitive privilege, owner, and clear, review, or cleanup state.
interactions: state is visible through tokenized border color
card content stays stable across responsive breakpoints

components.name: EntitlementBlastRadiusRow
components.purpose: Captures app entitlement path, affected group, blast radius, and cleanup status.
interactions: grid collapses without hiding blast-radius details

components.name: GroupCleanupPlan
components.purpose: Captures group cleanup action and rollback-safe recovery path.
interactions: rollback note remains visible at narrow widths

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
